name: @firstpick/pi-skill-tech-deep-dive
description_en: Agents should invoke this skill when choosing or evaluating libraries, frameworks, tools, platforms, models, databases, APIs, or architectures for a use case. Produces criteria scoring, ecosystem assessment, and recommendations.
description_zh: 代理应在为用例选择或评估库、框架、工具、平台、模型、数据库、API 或架构时调用此技能。生成标准评分、生态系统评估和建议
